generators.js_source:
async(t,s)=>{let r=t[t.length-1];if(r==="")return[];let c=t.indexOf("dscl"),n;for(let i=c+1;i<t.length;i++){let p=t[i];if(p.startsWith("-"))continue;let m=t[i-1];if(!f.has(m)){n=p;break}}let o=r.lastIndexOf("/"),h=r.slice(0,o<0?0:o),{stdout:u}=await s({command:"dscl",args:[n,"-list",h??"/"]});return u.trim().split(`
`).map(i=>({name:i,icon:"\u{1F4C1}",priority:i[i.lastIndexOf("/")+1]==="_"?49:50}))}

name: -f
options.description: Targeted local node database file path

name: -raw
options.description: Don't strip off prefix from DirectoryService API constants

name: -plist
options.description: Print out record(s) or attribute(s) in XML plist format

name: -url
options.description: Print record attribute values in URL-style encoding
